prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day prediction of REGN stock, I applied typical short-term volatility patterns for large-cap biotech stocks. Given REGN's historical daily volatility of approximately 2-3%, I estimated a 3-day standard deviation of around 3.7%. The point estimate remains at the current price assuming no directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals expand symmetrically around this point using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI covers ±1.85%, 80% CI covers ±3.4%, and 90% CI covers ±4.4% of the current price.
